heading: Housing goals
label: 1430c Housing goals
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (d), was in the original “section 1336 of the Federal Housing Enterprises Safety and Soundness Act of 1992”, which was translated as meaning section 1336 of the Federal Housing Enterprises Financial Safety and Soundness Act of 1992, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Section 4566 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Director shall establish housing goals with respect to the purchase of mortgages, if any, by the Federal Home Loan Banks. Such goals shall be consistent with the goals established under sections 4561 through 4564 of this title.

children.heading: Considerations
children.label: b Considerations
children.text: In establishing the goals required by subsection (a), the Director shall consider the unique mission and ownership structure of the Federal Home Loan Banks.

children.heading: Transition period
children.label: c Transition period
children.text: To facilitate an orderly transition, the Director shall establish interim target goals for purposes of this section for each of the 2 calendar years following .July 30, 2008

children.heading: Monitoring and enforcement of goals
children.label: d Monitoring and enforcement of goals
children.text: The requirements of section 4566 of this title, shall apply to this section, in the same manner and to the same extent as that section applies to the Federal housing enterprises.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Annual report
children.label: e Annual report
children.text: The Director shall annually report to Congress on the performance of the Banks in meeting the goals established under this section.
